sections.title: A: Original passage gap fill practice
sections.instructions: Complete the original passage using the best answers for the gaps.
sections.passage:
Original passage for Review: Block 2 – Units 3 & 4

Mia joined a class project because the group wanted fresh practice for passage gap fill practice. The tutor wrote (1) ...... (2) ...... (3) ...... (4) ...... (5) ...... on the board and asked everyone to explain their choices. Later, the group compared (6) ...... (7) ...... (8) ...... (9) ...... (10) ...... with the rule from the lesson. The text is new, but it practises the same passage gap fill.

sections.title: B: Original matching practice
sections.instructions: Match each original prompt with the correct ending.

items.sentence: During the class project on Review: Block 2 – Units 3 & 4, Mia wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
items.answer: H – up with people who cheat at games.

items.sentence: In an original matching item about Review: Block 2 – Units 3 & 4, the best completion is ...... .
items.answer: C – out in the second round of the competition.

items.sentence: Sara checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.
The online lesson included a short sentence about Review: Block 2 – Units 3 & 4: the missing part is ...... .
items.answer: E – on with the activity while he answered the phone.

items.sentence: During the school club on Review: Block 2 – Units 3 & 4, Nina wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
items.answer: G – the race forward by a week.

items.sentence: In an original matching item about Review: Block 2 – Units 3 & 4, the best completion is ...... .
items.answer: A – up a martial art, to defend yourself.

items.sentence: Iris checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.
items.answer: B – to swimming as soon as she tried it.

items.sentence: The language lab included a short sentence about Review: Block 2 – Units 3 & 4: the missing part is ...... .
items.answer: D – out of the race because of a last minute injury.
